name: seo_geo_ai_agent_skills
description: A collection of 20 SEO and GEO-focused AI skills designed for use with Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and 35+ AI agents, enabling keyword research, content writing, technical SEO audits, rank tracking, and applying CORE-EEAT and CITE frameworks.

inputs.name: keyword_list
inputs.description: List of seed keywords or phrases for research and content generation.

inputs.name: website_url
inputs.description: URL of the target website for technical SEO audit or rank tracking.

inputs.name: content_text
inputs.description: Text content for SEO-driven rewriting or enhancement.

inputs.name: geographic_region
inputs.description: Specific location or region for localized SEO and GEO targeting.

inputs.name: ranking_data
inputs.description: Current search engine ranking data for monitoring and analysis.

outputs.name: keyword_analysis
outputs.description: Insights and metrics about keyword opportunities and competitiveness.

outputs.name: content_draft
outputs.description: SEO-optimized content generated or enhanced based on input parameters.

outputs.name: seo_audit_report
outputs.description: Technical SEO audit findings including issues and improvement recommendations.

outputs.name: rank_tracking_report
outputs.description: Trends and movements of targeted keywords in search engine rankings over time.

outputs.name: compliance_check
outputs.description: Flag indicating adherence to CORE-EEAT and CITE framework principles.

patterns: SEO content generation with CORE-EEAT and CITE framework adherence
Rank tracking and trend analysis automation
Multi-agent orchestration with generative AI models
steps: Receive input parameters such as keywords, content, website URLs, and geographic regions.
Perform keyword research analyzing volume, competitiveness, and relevance to GEO targets.
Generate or enhance SEO-friendly content integrating CORE-EEAT and CITE principles.
Conduct technical SEO audits on target websites to identify optimization opportunities.
Track search engine rankings of targeted keywords over time for performance monitoring.
Compile audit, content, and tracking results into structured reports or outputs.
Use prompt templates to interact across multiple AI agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, etc.)
use_cases: Generating optimized content for websites targeting specific geographic locations.
Conducting comprehensive SEO audits to improve website technical health.
Performing keyword research to identify valuable SEO and GEO opportunities.
Tracking keyword ranking progress for ongoing SEO campaigns.
Applying CORE-EEAT and CITE frameworks to enhance content trustworthiness and expertise.
Integrating with multiple AI agents for scalable automated SEO workflows.

prompt_templates.name: keyword_research_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Analyze the following keywords for search volume, competition, and GEO relevance: {keyword_list} in region {geographic_region}.

prompt_templates.name: content_writing_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Generate SEO-optimized content on the topic: {keyword_list}, adhering to CORE-EEAT and CITE frameworks.

prompt_templates.name: technical_audit_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Perform a full technical SEO audit of the website at URL: {website_url} and report critical issues.

prompt_templates.name: rank_tracking_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Provide rank tracking report for keywords: {keyword_list} on domain {website_url} over the last 30 days.

prompt_templates.name: seo_compliance_check_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Evaluate the content for compliance with CORE-EEAT and CITE SEO frameworks and return a compliance flag.
